/usr/bin/c++ -O2 CMakeFiles/MatrixMultiplication.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MatrixMultiplication.dir/src/ijk.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MatrixMultiplication.dir/src/ikj.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MatrixMultiplication.dir/src/jik.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MatrixMultiplication.dir/src/jki.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MatrixMultiplication.dir/src/kij.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MatrixMultiplication.dir/src/kji.cpp.o -o MatrixMultiplication
